name: Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the gelatin and water in a bowl until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
2. Scald the milk in a saucepan over low heat. Add the chocolate shavings and stir to dissolve them.
3. Blend in the gelatin mixture into the scalded milk. Remove from heat and add sugar, salt, and vanilla extract. Stir until well blended.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely. Stir in the whipped cream gently using a spatula.
5. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch x 12-inch pan. Cover with plastic wrap.
6. Freeze until firm.
7. To serve, scoop large balls of mousse using a spoon and place them in tall wine glasses. Alternatively, cut into squares and serve.
This recipe yields approximately 8 servings.
